spec.name: The Tomb Entrance
spec.description: You are in a small, dark chamber that has stood undisturbed for many years. To the north stands a massive stone tomb, which is covered in hieroglyphics and gold-lined carvings that mark it as the final resting place of the mighty pharoahs of this land.

north.description: You see the tomb of the pharoahs.

up.description: The stone ceiling has some cracks in it, through which a dim light streams.

extra_descs.description: The tomb looks like it has stood for many years, much like the pyramid which encloses it. It is covered in small hieroglyphics.
The markings indicate that this tomb is indeed the tomb of the greatest pharoahs of the ancient civilization that built this massive pyramid.
